expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected search implementation output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the search implementation workflow

input: Apply search implementation to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive search implementation analysis with evidence-tagged findings
